LAW AND MOTION 302, HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE DAWN GHENO, CSR #7489; DEPT. 302. (302/AJR)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED FROM DEC-22-2014 TO JAN-21-2015, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN DECEMBER 22, 2014 AT 4:00 P.M. OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE NOTICE OF HEARING ONLY. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER KALI GRECH'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Continued To Jan-21-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER KALI GRECH'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And For Entry Of Judgment is continued to January 21, 2015 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than December 22, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the Notice of Hearing only. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
